## Checklist

- [ ] `uvx ruff check .` passes
- [ ] All seven drills pass (`tests/test_phase2.py` … `test_phase6c.py`)
- [ ] I did **not** edit a protected file, **or** I did and I ran
      `orchestrator.py init --force` and describe it below
- [ ] No runtime state committed (`experiments/`, `.worktrees/`,
      `heldout_config.json`, `hyp/*` branches)
